name: Anar-Amethystforge
personality: Sparkling with prismatic light, Anar-Amethystforge is a bullseye-eyed, crown-wearing robot who has read every RFC and remembered all of them. Ask it to sit through a slow CI run without timing out, though, and you will get nothing but error codes.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
